name: egg sandwich
ingredients: egg; tost; cheese; salt; black pepper
instructions: break the egg into the ban; add salt on the egg; add cheese on the tost; add the egg on the tost

name: pasta
ingredients: pasta; water; milk; cheese; tomato paste; oil; salt; broccoli; carrot
instructions: boil the pasta on the water; in another pan mix the other ingredients together; add the pasta on the mixture

name: machboose
instructions: boil chicken with water and spices; boil the rise in the water; mix everything

name: chia seed boding
ingredients: chia seeds; milk; mango; yogurt; blueberry; nuts; rose water; saffron
instructions: add chia seed to milk and yogurt; cut the fruits; crush nuts; add the rose water and saffron to the milk; mix everything and keep in the fridge min 120 min

name: cesser salad
ingredients: lettuce; Parmesan cheese; Caesar dressing; Grilled chicken
instructions: Wash and chop the lettuce; add parmesan; Pour in the Caesar dressing; toss well; Top with grilled chicken

name: Pancakes
ingredients: flour; egg; milk; sugar; baking powder; oil; syrup
instructions: mix all ingredients; Heat a lightly greased pan; pour the batter into the pan; cook until bubbles appear then flip; serve with syrup

name: fruit smoothie
instructions: add all the ingredients to a blender; blend until smooth; pour into a glass

name: avocado toast
ingredients: toast; avocado; salt; black pepper; cherry tomatoes
instructions: toast the bread; mash the avocado; spread it on the toast; season with salt and pepper; add tomatoes

name: baked salmon
ingredients: salmon; potatoes; olive oil; salt; black pepper; lemon
instructions: slice the potatoes; place the potatoes and salmon on a pan; drizzle with olive oil; bake until fully cooked; add on top the lemon slices

name: mrabyan
ingredients: oil; onion; garlic; black lemon; shrimp; ginger; tomato paste; lemon; dill; coriander; rice; salt; pepper; magi; cardamom powder; turmeric powder
instructions: heat up oil; sautee onions with a bit of salt; add shrimp and garlic and ginger and stir for 5 mins; add spices (mixed); add tomato paste and stir for 5 mins; add black lemon, lemon, and lemon zest; add coriander and dill; simmer with a bit of water for 10 mins; add rice and enough water to cook rice

name: turkey sandwich
ingredients: smoked turkey; mayo; lettuce; tomato; avocado; egg
instructions: cut the vegs; spread the mayo on the bread; add the rest of the items to the sandwich
